name: appInsights
description: Azure Application Insights MCP — query traces, exceptions, requests, and custom events via KQL

prerequisites.description: Azure service principal with Reader role on the App Insights resource

setupInstructions: Ensure the service principal in ~/.config/nanoclaw/azure-sp.json has Reader role on the Application Insights resource. Set the APP_INSIGHTS_APP_ID env var in the manifest or pass it via query parameters.
